notes: Sprint 19 grooming 2026-04-29: 8 stories on sprint/runtime-fixes from main@d8583d3 (post-Sprint-18 close). Theme: fix what Sprint 18's 'tests pass / production fails' exposed + server schema reconciliation. 1L + 3M + 4S = ~13 points (US-234 M for VCELL trigger; US-237 M for drive_summary 3-way schema reconciliation). All stories independent — Ralph picks any order. Per CIO Sprint 19 rules: NO git commands in sprint.json, NO human tasks (live drills go on action-items list). Live-drill validation per new feedback_runtime_validation_required.md rule: synthetic tests must tightly mock production conditions. Next available: US-242.
